return(function(...)local 049\073\111\061";"\116\047\072\109","\098\053\080\054","\116\085\100\113\054\056\073\072";"\112\102\050\051\053\070\108\118","\051\122\082\050\118\077\118\057\122\049\043\111\079\115\098\061";"\112\047\071\080\077\053\054\077";"\075\110\090\099\100\109\121\043\075\122\075\043\119\099\049\057\070\043\108\061","\113\083\108\104","\083\109\109\118\057\078\088\099\120\115\101\112\065\075\120\067\056\068\113\068\112\088\061\061","\089\102\102\105\077\052\100\090\089\088\061\061","\120\099\120\105\070\122\121\112\098\116\097\114\104\083\121\105\087\103\053\077\052\103\067\051\075\099\055\106\087\043\114\061","\115\099\077\073\122\056\061\061","\087\078\090\077\087\122\097\077\120\099\055\116";"\072\078\090\077\087\122\097\077";"\052\048\111\080\116\122\121\115\071\085\080\080\049\097\102\097\053\080\104\120\100\088\061\061";"\105\120\073\080\118\077\081\111\119\050\061\061","\072\052\049\114\102\068\070\105","\088\111\103\106\078\086\102\112\055\085\119\089";"","\066\112\120\105\115\114\113\090\082\072\061\061","\087\076\107\053\076\089\098\082\047\073\088\104","\099\116\087\087\049\048\112\049\099\049\079\075\103\084\067\048\085\098\085\085\101\049\120\115\055\066\053\053\104\118\087\061","\083\053\067\047\114\107\083\078\056\054\111\071\085\050\061\061";"\103\099\083\080\100\083\053\121\104\078\049\087\115\078\121\114\098\072\061\061","\067\086\065\089\088\087\102\061";"\113\098\099\050\057\105\106\068\114\102\082\084";"\117\120\055\108\065\057\069\099\113\107\050\061";"\122\122\083\053\116\071\081\087\109\049\067\086";"\106\055\105\068\102\088\080\061";"\112\090\098\071","\054\050\051\097\116\072\061\061","\072\112\049\074","\049\083\084\056\113\102\050\106";"\053\077\056\103","\074\083\105\086\052\083\053\087\055\104\050\052","\114\048\080\100\054\077\050\076","\098\099\053\049\104\099\056\061";"\098\078\121\049\075\043\067\068\104\099\107\112\070\050\061\061","\117\074\114\080\076\048\109\115\102\089\122\071\121\118\051\122","\087\080\054\111\049\080\118\109\067\078\
